inline_comments.message: why /actuator/prometheus (vs. the /metrics which is the default prometheus path), and why the need for the session?

In spring boot, prometheus metrics are exposed on actuator/prometheus. We just have to add spring-boot-starter-actuator dependency in pom.xml. We get a lot of benefits including application metrics on top of system metrics - like success/failure-request-count and time taken etc. We don't need to use policy-common server anymore in spring boot apps.
